meaning: n.[鸟]海雀(北极地区海鸟,体大,短翅,蹼足)
examples: The great auk is an extinct bird.
Thee Swiss cities of Zurich and Geneva topped an urban quality of life survey published by aUK research company.
Henry stands attentively, waits each time for the new wonder, emits small noises of pleasure for each Sandhill Crane,American Coot, Great Auk, Pileated Woodpecker.
